questions.context_sentence: What club do you want to join?
questions.cn: 你想加入什么俱乐部？
questions.hint: cl + ub，一群人聚在一起的地方。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What ____ do you want to join? (提示: 社团)

questions.context_sentence: Hello! I want to join the ping-pong club.
questions.cn: 你好！我想加入乒乓球俱乐部。
questions.hint: joi (喜悦) + n，加入带来喜悦。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: How do you choose a school club?
questions.cn: 你如何选择一个学校社团？
questions.hint: ch + oose，挑选鹅 (goose) 一样仔细。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.meaning: n. 戏剧; 戏剧表演
questions.context_sentence: My name is Lin Hua, and I want to join the drama club.
questions.cn: 我叫林华，我想加入戏剧社。
questions.hint: dra (拉) + ma (妈)，拉着妈妈看戏剧。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: My name is Lin Hua, and I want to join the ____ club. (提示: 戏剧)

questions.context_sentence: Can you read with feeling?
questions.cn: 你能带着感情朗读吗？
questions.hint: feel (感觉) + ing，正在感受的情感。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Here's some good news!
questions.cn: 这里有个好消息！
questions.hint: new (新的) + s，新的事情就是新闻。
questions.title: Vocab Master
options: adj. 音乐的; 有音乐天赋的

questions.meaning: adj. 音乐的; 有音乐天赋的
questions.context_sentence: I can't play any musical instruments.
questions.cn: 我不会演奏任何乐器。
questions.hint: music (音乐) + al (的)，音乐的。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.meaning: adv. 正是如此; 准确地
questions.context_sentence: Exactly! How about Ella?
questions.cn: 完全正确！艾拉怎么样？
questions.hint: exact (精确的) + ly，完全正确。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: adv. 正是如此; 准确地

questions.context_sentence: I can play the drums.
questions.cn: 我会打鼓。
questions.hint: dr + um，咚咚打鼓的声音。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Circle can or can't with your own information.
questions.cn: 用你自己的信息圈出“能”或“不能”。
questions.hint: able (能够) + ity (名词后缀)，能够做事的力量。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Check the ____ table of different students. (提示: 能力)

questions.meaning: v. 用颜料画; 在……上刷油漆
questions.context_sentence: I can paint well.
questions.cn: 我擅长画画。
questions.hint: p + aint，用颜料 paint 画一幅画。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: I can ____ well in the art club. (提示: 画画)

questions.context_sentence: A cat can climb trees.
questions.cn: 猫会爬树。
questions.hint: clim + b (不发音)，像爬山一样b无声。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: She can do so much more.
questions.cn: 她能做的事情远不止这些。
questions.hint: m + ore，更多 (more) 矿石 (ore)。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: I'm good at telling stories. I often act out stories with my brother at home.
questions.cn: 我擅长讲故事。我经常和弟弟在家表演故事。
questions.hint: a + ct，行动起来！
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: We ____ out stories in the drama club.

questions.context_sentence: I'm interested in nature.
questions.cn: 我对大自然感兴趣。
questions.hint: interest (兴趣) + ed，人对事物有兴趣。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.meaning: n. 自然界; 大自然
questions.context_sentence: I'm interested in nature. I love hiking.
questions.cn: 我对大自然感兴趣。我喜欢徒步旅行。
questions.hint: na (那) + ture，那里的自然风光真美。
questions.title: Vocab Master
options: n. 自然界; 大自然
adj. 害羞的; 腼腆的

questions.context_sentence: Mapo tofu, beef noodles, jiaozi, baozi... You name it!
questions.cn: 麻婆豆腐、牛肉面、饺子、包子……应有尽有！
questions.hint: bee (蜜蜂) + f，蜜蜂不吃牛肉。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: I love eating ____ noodles. (提示: 牛肉)

questions.context_sentence: We watch birds, take photos, and collect plants and insects.
questions.cn: 我们观鸟、拍照，并收集植物和昆虫。
questions.hint: col (共同) + lect (选择)，共同选择 = 收集。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: We watch birds, take photos, and collect plants and insects.
questions.cn: 我们观鸟、拍照，并收集植物和昆虫。
questions.hint: in + sect (切)，身体分节的小虫子。
questions.title: Vocab Master
options: v. & n. 进入; 掉落; 跌倒

questions.context_sentence: Discover wildlife right under your nose!
questions.cn: 就在你眼前发现野生生物！
questions.hint: dis (去掉) + cover (遮盖)，去掉遮盖 = 发现。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Let's ____ new places together. (提示: 发现)

questions.meaning: n. 野生动物; 野生生物
questions.context_sentence: Discover wildlife right under your nose!
questions.cn: 就在你眼前发现野生生物！
questions.hint: wild (野生的) + life (生命)，野外的生命。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: We can see a lot of ____ in this national park. (提示: 野生动物)

questions.context_sentence: You can soon cook for your family.
questions.cn: 你很快就能为家人做饭了。
questions.hint: s + oon，很快就到中午 (noon)。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Books can open your mind and make you think.
questions.cn: 书籍可以开阔你的思维，让你思考。
questions.hint: m + ind，我的 (mine) 头脑 (mind)。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.meaning: v. & n. 进入; 掉落; 跌倒
questions.context_sentence: Come to the library on Tuesdays after school and fall in love with books!
questions.cn: 放学后每周二来图书馆，爱上阅读吧！
questions.hint: f + all，所有人都跌倒了。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Leaves ____ from the trees in autumn.

questions.context_sentence: Can you play Chinese chess?
questions.cn: 你会下中国象棋吗？
questions.hint: play (玩) + Chinese chess (中国象棋)。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: I can't play any musical instruments.
questions.cn: 我不会演奏任何乐器。
questions.hint: musical (音乐的) + instrument (器具) = 乐器。
questions.title: Vocab Master
options: v. 用颜料画; 在……上刷油漆

questions.context_sentence: I often act out stories with my brother at home.
questions.cn: 我经常和哥哥在家里表演故事。
questions.hint: act (行动) + out (出来)，把故事演出来。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Let's ____ this dialogue in front of the class.

questions.context_sentence: I often act out stories with my brother at home.
questions.cn: 我经常和哥哥在家里表演故事。
questions.hint: at (在) + home (家)，在家里。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: I'm really interested in reading all kinds of books.
questions.cn: 我对我对阅读各种书籍真的很感兴趣。
questions.hint: interested (感兴趣的) + in (在)，对...产生兴趣。
questions.title: Vocab Master
options: n. 戏剧; 戏剧表演

questions.context_sentence: Come to the library on Tuesdays after school and fall in love with books!
questions.cn: 放学后每周二来图书馆，爱上阅读吧！
questions.hint: fall (掉入) + in love with (爱中)，陷入爱中。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: We watch birds, take photos, and collect plants and insects.
questions.cn: 我们观鸟、拍照，并收集植物和昆虫。
questions.hint: take (拿) + photos (照片)，拿着相机拍照。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: I like to ____ with my camera.

questions.context_sentence: It's more than reading.
questions.cn: 它不仅仅是阅读。
questions.hint: more (更多) + than (比)，多于。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Oh, but you can sing well.
questions.cn: 哦，但是你唱歌唱得很好。
questions.hint: s + ing，唱着歌前进 (sing)。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Sure. I can play the guitar.
questions.cn: 当然。我会弹吉他。
questions.hint: gui + tar，弹吉他的声音。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: He is learning to play the ____. (提示: 吉他)

questions.context_sentence: She can play the violin, right?
questions.cn: 她会拉小提琴，对吗？
questions.hint: vio + lin，优美的琴声。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: I can't cook, but I love great food. I want to cook for my family.
questions.cn: 我不会做饭，但我喜欢美食。我想为家人做饭。
questions.hint: c + ook，看着 book (书) 学 cook (做饭)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
options: v. & n. 进入; 掉落; 跌倒

questions.context_sentence: Now I'm brave enough to talk, and even sing, in front of lots of people.
questions.cn: 现在我足够勇敢，可以在很多人面前讲话，甚至唱歌了。
questions.hint: br + ave，勇敢地面对波浪 (wave)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: The boy was ____ enough to save the dog. (提示: 勇敢)

questions.meaning: adj. 害羞的; 腼腆的
questions.context_sentence: I'm usually very shy, but when I'm in a play, I no longer feel afraid.
questions.cn: 我通常很害羞，但当我在演戏时，我就不再害怕了。
questions.hint: sh + y，害羞地嘘 (sh) 一声。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: adj. 害羞的; 腼腆的
